case_title: WESLEY WILLIS VS. LUXOR CAB et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIS, WESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB KHEDR, ESLAM DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-13-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-15-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-27-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-12-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-12-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JAMES M. ROGERS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-12-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-27-2002. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-13-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
